description: Use this skill whenever the user wants a deep, dedicated security and robustness review on changed or specified code — looking for injection vectors, panic / crash sources, data-integrity issues, edge-case fragility, and concurrency hazards across two axes (Security and Robustness) with findings ranked Critical / High / Medium / Low. Trigger phrases include "deep security review", "robustness review", "audit this code for vulnerabilities", "find injection vectors", "check for unwrap or panic sources", "pre-merge security pass", "release-readiness review", or any explicit ask for a thorough hardening review beyond a lightweight PR check. Trigger even when the user does not say "robust-review" — phrases like "what could break this in production?", "how safe is this code?", or "audit before release" qualify.

results.query: Run robust-review on src/auth/ — full depth, S-Critical to S-Low. Pre-release gate, I need every injection vector and panic source surfaced before the merge.
Pre-merge security audit on the new payment integration (src/payment/). Authorization, session handling, race conditions — go deep, this is going to prod tomorrow.
Robust review on file src/handlers/checkout.ts. I want axis 1 (security) and axis 2 (robustness) findings — injection, unwrap, edge cases, concurrency.
deep sec review on src/api/ before release pls. dont miss anything — were getting audited next week
We're cutting a release tag tomorrow. Need a final security/robustness pass on the entire src/auth/ and src/payment/ trees with S-Critical/S-Low breakdown.
Run robust-review --all on the impl-orchestrator output for the inventory component. Stage 4 review — security/robustness/spec axes in parallel.
Audit src/api/handlers/ for all the standard issues — SQL injection, command injection, XSS, panic sources, missing input validation, race conditions.
review src/auth deep, im paranoid about the new oauth flow and the new redirect logic in particular
Robust review pass on glob 'src/**/*.ts' — flag S-Critical and S-High items for the release branch. I want to know what blocks the tag.
Security/robustness deep dive on the new search query parser (src/search/parser.ts) before we ship it. Specifically injection via search terms.
Quick PR review on src/utils/format.ts — 5 min Critical/Warning/Info pass.
Compare src/order/ implementation against DESIGN/03_order.md — Missing/Diverged/Extra findings.
Auto-fix the S-Critical findings from the last robust-review on src/auth/. Standard patterns.
Help me write a regex for IPv6 addresses with abbreviated zero groups.
Fix the bug in handlers/order.ts:88 — race condition on inventory decrement. Verify with regression tests.
How do I store API keys securely in a Node.js app — env vars, secret manager, vault?
Light review on my last commit, just structure and naming. No deep audit needed.
What's the OWASP Top 10? Need a quick reference for a security training session.
Implement the auth refactor from DESIGN/01_auth.md autonomously with the 6-stage process.
Set up Snyk scanning in CI for vulnerability detection on the npm dependencies.
